name: Chili-Cheese Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a saucepan.
2. Add chopped onions and garlic; fry gently for 5 minutes.
3. Process tomatoes into a puree.
4. Drain and chop green chilies.
5. Add tomatoes, chilies, chili relish, and cumin to the onion mixture. Stir well and cover. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. In a bowl, combine ground beef with remaining onions, salt, and pepper. Divide into 4 equal portions and shape each into a 1-inch round burger.
7. Heat corn oil in a large skillet.
8. Add burgers and cook for 5-6 minutes on each side until browned.
9. Top each burger with a slice of cheese.
10. Arrange lettuce on 4 bun halves. Place the burger on the lettuce and top with chili sauce, onion slices, and remaining bun halves.
11. Serve hot in napkins.
